methods.name: originate_overcollateralized

args.name: asset_id
args.desc: - asset to borrow (iUSDC asset ID or 0 for ALGO)

methods.desc:
Originate an OVERCOLLATERALIZED loan.
Borrower must first send collateral to Vault (create_oracle_entry).

methods.name: originate_revolving

args.name: initial_draw
args.desc: - initial draw amount (can be 0 to just open the line)

methods.desc:
Originate a REVOLVING credit line.
CreditOracle determines the credit limit. No collateral required.

args.name: maturity_rounds
args.desc: - rounds until full repayment is due

methods.name: repay

args.name: payment
args.desc: - the preceding asset transfer (or pay txn for ALGO)

methods.desc: Repay any loan type. The asset transfer must precede this call.
